# Best AI Code Tools for Machine Learning in 2026

Machine learning development requires writing complex code and handling large datasets. AI tools make ML development faster and more accessible!

Check out our [[link:/category/Code|Code category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]]: ML Code Generation

[[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] helps developers write ML code faster.

### Copilot for Machine Learning
- **Model code**: Generate neural networks and algorithms
- **Documentation**: Explain ML concepts and code
- **Debugging**: Find issues in ML pipelines

**Try GitHub Copilot**: https://github.com/copilot

---

## [[link:/tools/13|Cursor]]: AI-First ML Development

[[link:/tools/13|Cursor]] offers an AI-first IDE perfect for ML development.

### Cursor for ML
- **Chat with code**: Ask questions about your ML codebase
- **Auto-completion**: Get intelligent suggestions
- **Model exploration**: Understand complex ML systems

**Try Cursor**: https://cursor.sh
